attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  SOURCE_DML_TYPE
 ,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
 ,REFRESH_DATETIME
 ,CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID
 ,CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
 ,PARTY_SITE_ID
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY
 ,CREATION_DATE 
 ,CREATED_BY
 ,ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE
 ,STATUS
 ,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
 ,REQUEST_ID
 ,PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
 ,PROGRAM_ID
 ,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
 ,WH_UPDATE_DATE
 ,ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
 ,ATTRIBUTE1
 ,ATTRIBUTE2
 ,ATTRIBUTE3
 ,ATTRIBUTE4
 ,ATTRIBUTE5
 ,ATTRIBUTE6
 ,ATTRIBUTE7
 ,ATTRIBUTE8
 ,ATTRIBUTE9
 ,ATTRIBUTE10
 ,ATTRIBUTE11
 ,ATTRIBUTE12
 ,ATTRIBUTE13
 ,ATTRIBUTE14
 ,ATTRIBUTE15
 ,ATTRIBUTE16
 ,ATTRIBUTE17
 ,ATTRIBUTE18
 ,ATTRIBUTE19
 ,ATTRIBUTE20
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19
 ,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20
 ,ORG_ID
 ,BILL_TO_FLAG
 ,MARKET_FLAG
 ,SHIP_TO_FLAG
 ,CUSTOMER_CATEGORY_CODE
 ,LANGUAGE
 ,KEY_ACCOUNT_FLAG
 ,TP_HEADER_ID
 ,ECE_TP_LOCATION_CODE
 ,SERVICE_TERRITORY_ID
 ,PRIMARY_SPECIALIST_ID
 ,SECONDARY_SPECIALIST_ID
 ,TERRITORY_ID
,ADDRESS_TEXT 
 ,TERRITORY
 ,TRANSLATED_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
 ,CREATED_BY_MODULE
 ,APPLICATION_ID
FROM
GGACML.CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL
WHERE 
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '60' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL)

SELECT
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.PARTY_SITE_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CREATED_BY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.STATUS,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.REQUEST_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.PROGRAM_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.WH_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE17,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ORG_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.BILL_TO_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.MARKET_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.SHIP_TO_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CUSTOMER_CATEGORY_CODE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.LANGUAGEA,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.KEY_ACCOUNT_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.TP_HEADER_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ECE_TP_LOCATION_CODE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.SERVICE_TERRITORY_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.PRIMARY_SPECIALIST_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.SECONDARY_SPECIALIST_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.TERRITORY_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.ADDRESS_TEXT,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.TERRITORY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.TRANSLATED_CUSTOMER_NAME,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CREATED_BY_MODULE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
From
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL,
(
select CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL
minus
select CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from
$$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL
) ACM
Where
ACM.CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID=STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.CUST_ACCT_SITE_ID and
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_HZ_CUST_ACCT_SITES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
